facebook.caption: 4.6 stars. 550 reviews. Right on Bãi Dài. The Beach Bistro earns it every time. Sit close to the water, order what the regulars order, and you'll get it. Not every restaurant on the north end of Phu Quoc pulls numbers like that. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sand underfoot, sea in front, food hitting the table at The Beach Bistro on Bãi Dài. 550 people rated this 4.6 stars. Watch why.
